heading: Omitted
label: 671 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , ; , , which related to use of funds of the Ute Indian Tribe of the Uintah and Ouray Reservation for expenditure and per capita payments, regulations applicable to loans, and restrictions on attorney fees, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Aug. 21, 1951, ch. 338, § 165 Stat. 193June 29, 1954, ch. 41268 Stat. 321
